interface: CloudWatch Logs API Logs_20140328 (application/x-amz-json-1.1) via AWSSDK.CloudWatchLogs 4.0.101.2

describe_log_streams.next_token: opaque; absent on the last page; expires after 24 hours

get_log_events.termination: a response whose nextForwardToken equals the nextToken passed in means the end of the stream; an empty events page with a NEW token is not the end
get_log_events.timestamps: epoch milliseconds; event order within a page is preserved

errors.sequence_token_correction: per current PutLogEvents docs the sequenceToken parameter is ignored and InvalidSequenceTokenException / DataAlreadyAcceptedException are never returned anymore; they are classified as terminal legacy write-path errors and must never be retried or confused with throttling

retry_policy.delay_formula: delay = min(MaxDelay, BaseDelay * 2^attempt) with attempt starting at 0
retry_policy.bound: at most MaxThrottleRetries retries, only for retryable_codes
retry_policy.sdk_note: the harness constructs AmazonCloudWatchLogsClient with MaxErrorRetry=0 so the exporter owns the retry policy
